blockingIssues.check: Direct native backend parity readiness matrix has no blocked rows.
Direct native runtime ABI and capability shims cover the supported stage1 surface.
Direct native diagnostics, provenance, and debug evidence are at parity with the supported toolchain.
Generated-Rust backend, rustc targeted-build fallback, and compatibility alias are removed from the supported toolchain.
AxiOM compiler source layout and self-hosting boundaries are defined.
A previously shipped axiomc snapshot can build the next axiomc without Cargo.
Compiler-internal verification is expressed in AxiOM property form.
LSP server and protocol path are AxiOM-owned.
